title: Oil prices rise toward $98 — Brent $96.89 (+0.93%), 3rd straight session gains
snippet: Brent crude rose to $96.89 per barrel, up 0.93%, gaining for the 3rd straight session. Trading range was $95.76-$97.24. Risk premium is elevated from stalled peace talks and continued geopolitical tensions including the Kuwait airport attack and information warfare over US destroyer claims.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 유가가 3거래일 연속 상승하며 $97에 근접. 쿠웨이트 공항 공격·협상 교착·정보전 등 복합 리스크 프리미엄 반영
